zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan De Chillington於1368年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾林頓時，她的父親Sir John Giffard25歲，母親Margaret Whitmore18歲。她和Sir Richard Knightley至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1417年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan De Chillington于1368年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾林頓时，她的父亲Sir John Giffard25岁，母亲Margaret Whitmore18岁。她和Sir Richard Knightley至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1417年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Chillington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Shilvington in Morpeth (Northumberland). The placename probably means something like ‘the farmstead of the people who live at the ledge’, from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + the groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
perhaps a habitational name from Shitlington (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Scyt(t)el + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan De Chillington was born in 1368, in Chillington, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Giffard, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Whitmore, was 18. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Richard Knightley. She died in 1417, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan De Chillington est née en 1368, à Chillington, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Giffard, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whitmore, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Richard Knightley. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan De Chillington 1368 in Chillington, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Giffard 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Whitmore 18. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard Knightley mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan De Chillington è nata il nel 1368 nel Chillington, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Giffard, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Whitmore, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Richard Knightley. Morì nel 1417, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan De Chillingtonが1368年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチリントンで生まれた時，父Sir John Giffardは25歳，母Margaret Whitmoreは18歳であった。彼女はSir Richard Knightleyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1417年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan De Chillington(이)가 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 치링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Giffard(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Whitmore(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Knightley(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan De Chillington родилась в 1368 г. в местности чиллингтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Giffard было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whitmore, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Richard Knightley. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
